lesson.subtitle: Aula 8 -- Describing Your Aircraft -- Features & Adjectives
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Karina Macedo | Aula 8 -- Describing Your Aircraft

listenings.text: Hello Robert, this is Karina Macedo. Thank you for your time. Now I want to describe our aircraft for you. It is a modern aircraft, and it is very safe. It is also fast, so you save time on every trip. The cabin is comfortable for eight people. It has a powerful engine, and it has a long range. You can fly very far without a stop. It is perfect for business and for long trips. I am very proud of this aircraft. I hope you like it. I will send you all the details in the proposal. Thank you again, Robert. Have a great day.

Hello Karina, this is Robert Pierce from Falcon Aviation. Thank you for the description of your aircraft. It sounds very good. I like that it is modern and safe. I have one question about the engine. Is the engine powerful enough for long trips? And what is the range of the aircraft? My team wants to know if the cabin is comfortable for eight people. Please send me the full details soon. I think this aircraft is perfect for our company. I will wait for your proposal. Thank you, Karina. Talk to you soon.

extra_audio.text: First, Karina prepared a full description of her aircraft. Then she said it is modern, fast, and safe. Next, she explained that it has a powerful engine and a long range. After that, Robert asked if the cabin is comfortable for eight people. Finally, Karina sent the proposal, and Robert was very happy.
